title: FeedbackAnalysis renders memories below confusion matrix

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Feature: FeedbackAnalysis renders memories below confusion matrix

  Scenario: Memories section appears when data contains memories key
    Given feedbackData includes a "memories" object with one score and two topics
    When FeedbackAnalysis renders in single-scorecard mode
    Then a collapsible section titled "Topic Memories" is present below the FeedbackAnalysisDisplay
    And the section contains a TopicList component with two topics

  Scenario: Memories section hidden when no memories data
    Given feedbackData does not contain a "memories" key
    When FeedbackAnalysis renders
    Then no "Topic Memories" section is present
    And the FeedbackAnalysisDisplay renders normally without additional elements

  Scenario: Memories section collapsed by default
    Given feedbackData includes memories with topics
    When FeedbackAnalysis renders
    Then the "Topic Memories" section header is visible
    And the topic list content is not visible (collapsed)
    And a ChevronDown icon indicates the section can be expanded

  Scenario: Expanding the memories section reveals topics
    Given the "Topic Memories" section is collapsed
    When the user clicks the section header
    Then the topic list content becomes visible
    And the icon changes to ChevronUp

  Scenario: Each score's topics render as a labeled group
    Given memories contains two scores: "Compliance" with 3 topics and "Empathy" with 2 topics
    When the memories section is expanded
    Then "Compliance" topics render as a labeled TopicList with 3 topics
    And "Empathy" topics render as a labeled TopicList with 2 topics

  Scenario: All-scorecards mode shows memories per scorecard
    Given feedbackData.mode is "all_scorecards"
    And two scorecards each have memories data
    When a scorecard is expanded
    Then the memories section appears below that scorecard's FeedbackAnalysisDisplay
    And only that scorecard's memories are shown

  Scenario: Empty memories scores array shows no section
    Given feedbackData.memories exists but memories.scores is an empty array
    When FeedbackAnalysis renders
    Then no "Topic Memories" section is present
